gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor robot checking on plants (representing apps) in a greenhouse. The robot has a clipboard or is scanning the plants to record their metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
